name: Flexible Racetrack and Car - 139pc - Gigglescape™
description:
Your child will be on a roll with the 139-Piece Flexible Racetrack and Car Set from Gigglescape™. This set includes 126 flexible track pieces, four bridges, an intersection, and a gate, all ready to be assembled in any configuration they can imagine. It features two battery- or child-powered cars, ready to drive along the track. Recommended for ages three and up, this set helps develop their problem-solving and fine motor skills.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
